name: Blackbeans Saifun
recipeIngredient: 1 can black beans (Hain or 12 oz. homemade with cooking juices)
1 tsp ginger curry (pre-made powder or mix of the two)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook saifun noodles for less than 5 minutes.
2. Heat the can of black beans.
3. Blend tamari, balsamic vinegar, sucanat, hot mustard powder, and ginger curry together.
4. Add the blended ingredients to the heated black beans.
5. Mix well and serve a 50/50 proportion of cooked saifun and black bean mixture. Serves two.
Note: Turn off the heat when cooking the black beans.
